title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-2R1 — Launcher Trace Precision and Complete Reference Sharding
intent: Add a new isolated standard-library-only V1A-2R1 refinement that verifies and preserves V1A-2 evidence, removes false launcher edges, resolves statically derivable FOXAI launcher variables, and replaces the global reference-line ceiling with deterministic per-file coverage and sharded indexes without executing FOXAI source, launchers, interpreters, models, services, repairs, or network actions.
rollback_boundary: If any validation fails, restore only the three newly added System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore V1A-2R1 files. Generated V1A-2R1 indexes are mission-scoped and must not be treated as authoritative unless the Workshop result is applied_verified. Existing V1A-1 and V1A-2 evidence remains unchanged.

    "project_root": "Z:\\FOXAI",
    "verified_v1a2_output": "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
  },
  "launcher_evidence_types": [
    "called_launchers",

    "python_scripts",

      "STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json",

      "REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json",

      "QUERY_EXAMPLES.md"
    ],
    "mission_output": "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260721-060224-2EA5A3_V1A2R1_REFINED_BRIDGE",
    "shards": "reference_shards/REFERENCE_LINES_*.json"
  },
  "purpose": "Refine static launcher tracing and replace the global reference-line ceiling with deterministic per-file coverage and sharded reference indexes.",
  "reference_policy": {
    "global_line_record_ceiling": false,
    "omissions_reported_per_file": true,
    "overall_output_ceiling_bytes": 134217728,
    "per_file_nonblank_noncomment_line_limit": 5000,
    "shard_byte_target": 2097152,
    "shard_record_limit": 1200
  },
  "safety": {
    "deletion_or_renaming": false,
    "elevation": false,
    "existing_foxai_source_modified": false,
    "foxai_imports_or_execution": false,
    "launcher_execution": false,
    "models_loaded": false,
    "network_required": false,
    "python_interpreter_probes": false,
    "subprocess_launches": false,
    "third_party_dependencies_required": false
  },
  "schema": "foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a2r1.refined_static_bridge_contract.v1",
  "truth_boundary": "Static references, existence checks, hashes, and path resolution are evidence only. They do not prove that a launcher, interpreter, service, model, URL, or port is active or was executed.",
  "version": "1A-2R1"
}

# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-2R1

Mission: `ENG-20260721-060224-2EA5A3`

This isolated refinement improves the V1A-2 static launcher and source-reference bridge.

## Improvements

- Separates launcher calls, Python interpreter invocations, Python scripts, URLs, OS-shell references, working directories, existence checks, diagnostics, file operations, and control flow.
- Resolves sequential `SET` assignments, `%~dp0`, and the common `FOR %%I ... %%~fI` FOXAI-root canonicalization pattern.
- Keeps `%ComSpec%` as an operating-system shell reference.
- Does not treat shell built-ins, comments, diagnostic text, or URLs as filesystem launch targets.
- Replaces the global 60,000-line ceiling with deterministic reference shards and explicit per-file coverage.
- Preserves the verified V1A-2 code, symbol, import, setting, reference, known-good, and source-hash evidence.

## Safety

The component uses only the Python standard library. It does not execute FOXAI source, launchers, interpreters, PowerShell, models, services, tasks, shortcuts, repairs, package installers, or network operations.

Generated evidence belongs to the Engineering mission output. Static evidence never proves runtime activity.

validations.name: Verify exact V1A-2R1 payloads, syntax, standard-library safety boundary, and verified V1A-2 prerequisite
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A2R1"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
    (drop/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r1.py", installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r1.py", "2786d9104e7561780aafaccb59c337f92c2d807cbc69cc3cb2684b7a9c00a471"),
    (drop/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R1.json", installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R1.json", "df340e43e3940a66952652c62887fca8c3106bdfda4f0b193f18d6605417b24c"),
    (drop/r"README_V1A2R1.md", installed/r"README_V1A2R1.md", "4b24bff5c18ee389a54be6e452112f7d1c75c57f3fd4e99e902c920a39c40259"),
]
for source,target,expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), f"missing package file: {source}"
    assert target.is_file(), f"missing installed file: {target}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"package hash mismatch: {source}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"installed hash mismatch: {target}"
script_path=installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r1.py"
script=script_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(script_path),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split('.')[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
bad=sorted(imports & forbidden)
assert not bad, "forbidden imports: "+", ".join(bad)
for marker in ("subprocess.run(","subprocess.Popen(","os.system(","shell=True","requests.","urlopen(","socket.","pip install","Path.unlink(","shutil.rmtree(","os.remove(","os.rename(","importlib.import_module(","__import__(", "exec("):
    assert marker not in script, "forbidden operation marker: "+marker
contract=json.loads((installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a2r1.refined_static_bridge_contract.v1"
safety=contract.get("safety",{})
assert safety.get("network_required") is False
assert safety.get("third_party_dependencies_required") is False
assert safety.get("subprocess_launches") is False
assert safety.get("launcher_execution") is False
assert safety.get("python_interpreter_probes") is False
assert safety.get("foxai_imports_or_execution") is False
assert safety.get("existing_foxai_source_modified") is False
prior=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
prior_receipt=json.loads((prior/r"STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert prior_receipt.get("result")=="static_code_and_launcher_bridge_complete"
assert prior_receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R1_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

validations.name: Run launcher precision, variable expansion, URL classification, redaction, and fixture self-tests
Build refined launcher traces and deterministic per-file sharded reference evidence
Repeat refined build and require byte-for-byte deterministic core and shard output
Run the built-in refined output, hash, shard accounting, and false-edge validator
Verify precise static traces for the four current known-good FOXAI launchers
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-060224-2EA5A3_V1A2R1_REFINED_BRIDGE"
launch=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert launch.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert launch.get("record_count")==536
assert launch.get("launchers_executed") is False
assert launch.get("confirmed_active_or_executed_targets")==0
metrics=launch.get("false_edge_metrics",{})
for key in ("shell_builtin_launch_edge_count","url_as_filesystem_edge_count","comment_launch_edge_count","unresolved_confirmed_target_count"):
    assert metrics.get(key)==0, (key,metrics.get(key),metrics.get("samples"))
records={str(item.get("relative_path","")).replace('/','\\').casefold():item for item in launch.get("records",[])}
def record(name):
    key=name.replace('/','\\').casefold()
    assert key in records, f"missing known launcher: {name}"
    item=records[key]
    assert item.get("parse_status")=="refined_static_parsed", (name,item.get("parse_status"),item.get("error"))
    assert item.get("launcher_executed") is False
    return item
def values(item,kind):
    if kind=="interpreters": return [str(x.get("interpreter",{}).get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("interpreter_invocations",[])]
    if kind=="scripts": return [str((x.get("script") or {}).get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("interpreter_invocations",[]) if x.get("script")]
    if kind=="launchers": return [str(x.get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("called_launchers",[])]
    raise AssertionError(kind)
def require_suffix(item,kind,suffix):
    wanted=suffix.replace('/','\\').casefold()
    available=values(item,kind)
    assert any(value.endswith(wanted) for value in available), (item.get("relative_path"),kind,wanted,available)
def require_root(item):
    variables={str(k).casefold():str(v).replace('/','\\') for k,v in item.get("variables",{}).items()}
    assert variables.get("foxai_root","").casefold()==r"Z:\FOXAI".casefold(), (item.get("relative_path"),variables)
workshop=record("Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat")
require_root(workshop)
require_suffix(workshop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(workshop,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\manage_comfyui_normal.py")
portable=record("START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
require_suffix(portable,"interpreters",r"env\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(portable,"scripts",r"core\foxai_web.py")
web=record("START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat")
require_root(web)
require_suffix(web,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(web,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\start_comfyui_quiet.py")
require_suffix(web,"launchers",r"START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert 8765 in web.get("ports",[])
assert any(str(x.get("url","")).casefold()=="http://127.0.0.1:8765" for x in web.get("urls",[])), web.get("urls")
desktop=record("START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat")
require_root(desktop)
require_suffix(desktop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(desktop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\pythonw.exe")
require_suffix(desktop,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\start_comfyui_quiet.py")
require_suffix(desktop,"scripts",r"foxai.py")
for item in launch.get("records",[]):
    for edge in item.get("edges",[]):
        assert edge.get("confirmed_active_or_executed") is False
        assert edge.get("classification")!="url"
        if edge.get("unresolved_variables"):
            assert edge.get("confirmation")!="static_existing_target"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R1_KNOWN_LAUNCHER_TRACES_VERIFIED")

validations.name: Verify all refined outputs, complete shard accounting, source and known-good hashes, V1A-2 immutability, and 128 MiB ceiling
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-060224-2EA5A3_V1A2R1_REFINED_BRIDGE"
required={"STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json","REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json","STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json","KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json","REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json","REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json","QUERY_EXAMPLES.md"}
actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}
assert required.issubset(actual), f"missing outputs: {sorted(required-actual)}"
receipt=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("result")=="launcher_trace_precision_and_reference_sharding_complete"
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-060224-2EA5A3"
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","foxai_source_imported_or_executed","launchers_executed","python_interpreters_probed","models_loaded","existing_foxai_source_modified","global_line_record_ceiling_used"):
    assert receipt.get(key) is False, (key,receipt.get(key))
assert receipt.get("source_v1a2_outputs_verified") is True
assert receipt.get("known_good_candidates_all_match") is True
for key in ("shell_builtin_launch_edge_count","url_as_filesystem_edge_count","comment_launch_edge_count","unresolved_confirmed_target_count"):
    assert receipt.get(key)==0, (key,receipt.get(key))
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=out/Path(item["name"])
    assert path.is_file(), f"receipt output missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"], f"output size mismatch: {path}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"output hash mismatch: {path}"
code=json.loads((out/r"STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert code.get("file_count")==565
catalog=json.loads((out/r"STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert catalog.get("global_line_record_ceiling_used") is False
assert catalog.get("source_file_coverage_count")==code.get("file_count")
assert len(catalog.get("source_file_coverage",[]))==code.get("file_count")
assert catalog.get("shard_count")==len(catalog.get("shards",[]))
assert catalog.get("shard_count",0)>0
assert sum(int(x.get("record_count",0)) for x in catalog.get("shards",[]))==catalog.get("line_record_count")
for shard in catalog.get("shards",[]):
    path=out/Path(shard["name"])
    assert path.is_file(), path
    assert path.stat().st_size==shard["size_bytes"]
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==shard["sha256"]
coverage=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert coverage.get("global_line_record_ceiling_used") is False
assert coverage.get("source_files_from_v1a2")==565
status=coverage.get("current_source_hash_status",{})
assert status.get("changed_since_v1a2",0)==0, status
assert status.get("missing",0)==0, status
assert status.get("over_limit",0)==0, status
assert status.get("match")==565, status
known=json.loads((out/r"KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert known.get("record_count")==6
assert known.get("all_match") is True
assert all(item.get("status")=="match" for item in known.get("records",[]))
prior=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
prior_receipt=json.loads((prior/r"STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for item in prior_receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=prior/item["name"]
    assert path.is_file(), f"V1A-2 source missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"V1A-2 source changed: {path}"
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total<=128*1024*1024, f"output ceiling exceeded: {total}"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R1_REFINED_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
